notes: Panels are Axis III financing risk quintiles (Very Low / Low / Moderate / High / Very High).
Columns are Axis I valuation buckets within OAL (within-OAL percentile quintiles).
Rows are Axis II trajectory risk buckets (global percentile quintiles, risk-consistent labels).
Higher Axis II bucket = higher trajectory risk (more deteriorating).
Cell values are mean forward returns over the selected horizon.
Low-N cells are suppressed from display_value but still include count and summary stats.
